mapper.select: SELECT id, course_id, level, is_new, target_audience, requirements, price, original_price FROM course_properties WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT id, course_id, level, is_new, target_audience, requirements, price, original_price FROM course_properties WHERE course_id = #{courseId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO course_properties (id, course_id, level, is_new, target_audience, requirements, price, original_price) VALUES (#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{courseId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{level,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isNew,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{targetAudience,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{requirements,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{originalPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL})

INSERT INTO course_properties
id, course_id, level, is_new, target_audience, requirements, price, original_price,
#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{courseId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{level,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isNew,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{targetAudience,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{requirements,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{originalPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
